news.title:
Balaji Amines drops over 3% amid ammonia supply issues linked to Iran conflict.
Muthoot Finance gains nearly 3% despite weak market; NSE advance-decline ratio at 1:6.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines drops over 3% amid ammonia supply issues linked to Iran conflict.
Muthoot Finance gains nearly 3% despite weak market; NSE advance-decline ratio at 1:6.

news.title:
Max Financial to raise ₹2,000 crore via QIP; Manorama Industries plans ₹500 crore fundraising.
Balaji Amines hit by ammonia supply issues; JK Lakshmi Cement wins Assam limestone block bid.
news.summary:
Max Financial to raise ₹2,000 crore via QIP; Manorama Industries plans ₹500 crore fundraising.
Balaji Amines hit by ammonia supply issues; JK Lakshmi Cement wins Assam limestone block bid.

news.title:
Balaji Amines' plants face closures due to ammonia supply disruptions caused by West Asia war.
Shares rose 0.47% to ₹1,047.55 on BSE as the company explores alternatives for ammonia supply.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines' plants face closures due to ammonia supply disruptions caused by West Asia war.
Shares rose 0.47% to ₹1,047.55 on BSE as the company explores alternatives for ammonia supply.

news.title:
Middle East war disrupts shipping, affecting Balaji Amines' raw material supply.
Ammonia shortage halts production; some plants non-operational, financial impact unclear.
news.summary:
Middle East war disrupts shipping, affecting Balaji Amines' raw material supply.
Ammonia shortage halts production; some plants non-operational, financial impact unclear.

news.title:
India's battery market is booming, projected to grow from $5.8B in 2025 to ₹1.45L Cr by 2030, driven by EV adoption.
Neogen Chemicals and Balaji Amines focus on EV battery materials, while PCBL leads next-gen carbon tech for energy storage.
news.summary:
India's battery market is booming, projected to grow from $5.8B in 2025 to ₹1.45L Cr by 2030, driven by EV adoption.
Neogen Chemicals and Balaji Amines focus on EV battery materials, while PCBL leads next-gen carbon tech for energy storage.

news.title:
Balaji Amines Q3 FY26 revenue at Rs. 336.3 Cr, EBITDA Rs. 61.7 Cr, PAT Rs. 30.8 Cr.
Stable operations; Rs. 750 Cr subsidiary expansion with FY27 project launches planned.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines Q3 FY26 revenue at Rs. 336.3 Cr, EBITDA Rs. 61.7 Cr, PAT Rs. 30.8 Cr.
Stable operations; Rs. 750 Cr subsidiary expansion with FY27 project launches planned.

news.title: Balaji Amines Q3 consolidated net profit fell to ₹314M from ₹332M YoY.
news.summary: Balaji Amines Q3 consolidated net profit fell to ₹314M from ₹332M YoY.

news.title:
Balaji Amines shares surged 9.5% to Rs 1,173 after Maharashtra granted 'Mega Project' status to its Unit 4.
Despite a 33% 12-month correction, analysts project an 18.9% upside with a target price of Rs 1,362.3.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines shares surged 9.5% to Rs 1,173 after Maharashtra granted 'Mega Project' status to its Unit 4.
Despite a 33% 12-month correction, analysts project an 18.9% upside with a target price of Rs 1,362.3.

news.title:
Balaji Amines received ₹258 crore subsidy, waivers for Maharashtra unit 4 expansion under PSI 2013.
Q2 results: Net profit fell 15.6% YoY to ₹34.5 crore; revenue dipped 1.8% to ₹340.5 crore.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines received ₹258 crore subsidy, waivers for Maharashtra unit 4 expansion under PSI 2013.
Q2 results: Net profit fell 15.6% YoY to ₹34.5 crore; revenue dipped 1.8% to ₹340.5 crore.

news.title:
Balaji Amines Ltd received an Eligibility Certificate for expansion under the Mega Projects scheme.
It is eligible for Rs. 258.01 crore subsidy with incentives valid from Jan 2024 to Dec 2030.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines Ltd received an Eligibility Certificate for expansion under the Mega Projects scheme.
It is eligible for Rs. 258.01 crore subsidy with incentives valid from Jan 2024 to Dec 2030.

news.title:
Indian chemical companies are expanding into batteries and semiconductors, driven by clean energy and EV trends, creating new material demands.
PCBL, Neogen Chemicals, Balaji Amines, Acutaas, Archean Chemicals, and Stallion India are innovating in battery and semiconductor supply chains.
news.summary:
Indian chemical companies are expanding into batteries and semiconductors, driven by clean energy and EV trends, creating new material demands.
PCBL, Neogen Chemicals, Balaji Amines, Acutaas, Archean Chemicals, and Stallion India are innovating in battery and semiconductor supply chains.

news.title:
Balaji Amines reports Q2 FY26 revenue INR341cr, EBITDA INR67cr, PAT INR37cr with stable 19% margin.
Expansion in specialty chemicals underway, financed via internal accruals; new plants commissioning planned.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines reports Q2 FY26 revenue INR341cr, EBITDA INR67cr, PAT INR37cr with stable 19% margin.
Expansion in specialty chemicals underway, financed via internal accruals; new plants commissioning planned.

news.title:
Balaji Amines targets 15% volume growth in FY27 driven by Rs.750 crore BSCL expansion.
BSCL expansion nearing completion suggests potential operational boost for Balaji Amines.
news.summary:
Balaji Amines targets 15% volume growth in FY27 driven by Rs.750 crore BSCL expansion.
BSCL expansion nearing completion suggests potential operational boost for Balaji Amines.

news.title:
Balaji Amines has preponed its Q2FY26 earnings call to 12 Nov 2025, 12:30 PM IST.
Details, including dial-in numbers and RSVP, are available on the company's website and provided invite.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balaji Amines Ltd reported unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, with revenue of Rs. 30,919.72 lakhs for Q2.
Profit before tax for Q2 stood at Rs. 4,503.09 lakhs, while earnings per share were Rs. 9.71 (basic and diluted).
news.summary:
Balaji Amines Ltd reported unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, with revenue of Rs. 30,919.72 lakhs for Q2.
Profit before tax for Q2 stood at Rs. 4,503.09 lakhs, while earnings per share were Rs. 9.71 (basic and diluted).

news.title:
ONGC, Vodafone Idea, Bajaj Finance, Emami among firms releasing Q2 FY26 results Nov 10.
Other firms include Balaji Amines, Bajaj Consumer Care, Ather Energy, DOMS Industries.
news.summary:
ONGC, Vodafone Idea, Bajaj Finance, Emami among firms releasing Q2 FY26 results Nov 10.
Other firms include Balaji Amines, Bajaj Consumer Care, Ather Energy, DOMS Industries.

news.title:
PCBL Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Balaji Amines are leveraging India's EV growth by expanding into battery-related chemical production.
PCBL focuses on nano silicon and acetyl black, Neogen on lithium-based products, and Balaji on electronic grade DMC, enhancing their roles in clean energy.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemicals, Neogen Chemicals, and Balaji Amines are leveraging India's EV growth by expanding into battery-related chemical production.
PCBL focuses on nano silicon and acetyl black, Neogen on lithium-based products, and Balaji on electronic grade DMC, enhancing their roles in clean energy.
